scripts.build: npm run build -w @slanger/shared-types && npm run build -w @slanger/phonology && npm run build -w @slanger/morphology && npm run build -w @slanger/syntax && npm run build -w @slanger/lexicon && npm run build -w @slanger/validation && npm run build -w @slanger/llm-orchestrator && npm run build -w @slanger/api-gateway && npm run build -w @slanger/frontend
scripts.test: npm exec tsc -- -b --force && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm exec tsc -- -b && npm run typecheck -w @slanger/frontend
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @slanger/shared-types && npm run build -w @slanger/phonology && npm run build -w @slanger/morphology && npm run build -w @slanger/syntax && npm run build -w @slanger/lexicon && npm run build -w @slanger/validation && npm run build -w @slanger/llm-orchestrator && npm run build -w @slanger/api-gateway && npm run dev -w @slanger/api-gateway
